_comment: Machine-readable skill catalog for aoa-marketplace aggregation. Each entry maps a skill key to its source file in this repo.

skills.name: Brainstorm
skills.description: YC-style idea interrogation before building. Surfaces assumptions, sharpens scope, and decides whether to build.

skills.name: Identity Setup
skills.description: Guide a new company through setting their vision, mission, and identity in AoA.

skills.name: Sprint Planning
skills.description: Break a goal or idea into structured tasks with dependencies and agent assignments.

skills.name: Team Design
skills.description: Design the right agent team for a company or project. Recommends agent roles, adapter types, and concurrency.

skills.name: Office Hours
skills.description: Design thinking session for side projects, product features, or strategic bets. Six forcing questions that expose demand and user reality.

skills.name: Investigate
skills.description: Root-cause investigation for agent failures, blocked tasks, and unexpected outputs. No fixes without investigation first.

skills.name: Spec
skills.description: Author a backlog-ready spec or issue from a rough idea. Produces a structured task description ready to assign to an agent.

skills.name: Discussion Facilitation
skills.description: Extract and organize value from AoA discussion threads. Surfaces decisions, tasks, insights, and context from team conversations.

skills.name: Daily Triage
skills.description: Role-aware status and prioritization sweep. Surfaces what needs a human — open approvals, blockers, at-risk goals — ranked, without changing anything.

skills.name: Review Agent Output
skills.description: Check an agent's deliverable against a task's acceptance criteria and decide whether to approve it or send it back for revision.

skills.name: Delegate & Handoff
skills.description: The planning-to-execution bridge. Pick the right agent by workload and fit, write a task spec with clear acceptance criteria, set dependencies, and dispatch — with confirmation before every write.
